name: Tekion Automotive Retail Cloud API
what_it_does: Tekion Automotive Retail Cloud REST API for cloud-native dealer management system (DMS). Enables AI agents to access vehicle inventory, manage sales workflows and deal desking, schedule service appointments, retrieve customer records, process finance and insurance workflows, access analytics and reporting data, and integrate Tekion with OEM and third-party systems.
use_cases: Retrieving real-time vehicle inventory and pricing from automotive discovery agents
Managing deal desking and F&I workflows from automotive sales agents
Scheduling and managing service drive appointments from dealership operations agents
Integrating Tekion data with CRM and marketing platforms from customer lifecycle agents
not_for: Non-automotive retail without dealer management workflows
Legacy DMS users without Tekion specifically
Independent repair shops without franchise dealer OEM integration
best_when: A modern automotive dealership or dealer group running Tekion ARC (Automotive Retail Cloud) wants AI agents to automate inventory queries, appointment scheduling, deal tracking, and customer communication workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Customer vehicle purchase and financial data is highly sensitive. Tekion is newer platform — verify API maturity and stability before building critical integrations.

auth.notes: Tekion uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Developer portal for partner integrations. Dealer-level OAuth credentials. Open ecosystem approach — more accessible than Reynolds & Reynolds.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — DMS subscription plus developer program
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-dealership DMS subscription; developer/partner program for API access
pricing.notes: Pleasanton, CA company. Founded 2016 by ex-Tesla CIO. Cloud-native challenger to CDK and Reynolds. Growing rapidly but still smaller market share. More open API philosophy than legacy DMS providers.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Customer vehicle purchase and financial data is highly sensitive
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 developer program
Newer platform (2016) — API maturity and stability still evolving vs legacy DMS
US data residency only — verify for international dealer groups
More open API philosophy than CDK/Reynolds — but still requires partner program
agent_readiness.security_notes: Customer vehicle purchase and financial data. SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2 with dealer-level scoping. Cloud-native architecture. US data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Vehicle purchase and financial data. SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. US data residency. Cloud-native DMS.
